hook: A good prompt reveals taste, not just compliance with the app.
body: Taste helps people imagine your world and your energy more vividly than another harmless but forgettable answer.
voices: Mark Manson, The School of Life

hook: Men often write prompts that sound safe enough for everyone and memorable for no one.
body: It is better to be more legible to the right person than vaguely acceptable to everybody.
voices: Mark Manson, The School of Life

body: A thoughtful opinion about travel, music, or weekends can feel more attractive than another prompt engineered not to offend anyone.
